summary: Comprehensive testing of Talk-to-My-Lawyer application completed. Frontend UI is fully functional with excellent user experience, but backend API server is experiencing 502 Gateway errors preventing full end-to-end functionality testing.

critical_bugs.issue: Returning 502 Bad Gateway errors - backend server appears to be down or misconfigured
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents all authentication, letter submission, and data operations

critical_bugs.issue: POST requests to /api/auth/* endpoints return 502 errors
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot sign up or log in to the application

server_configuration.issue: tRPC server not responding - possible port configuration or process issue
server_configuration.suggested_fix: Check backend server process and port 8001 configuration

ui_functionality.issue: Frontend UI is working perfectly - no issues found

design_quality.issue: Excellent professional legal services branding and UX design

passed_tests: Homepage loads with correct branding and content
Navigation bar with all required elements (Features, Pricing, FAQ, Sign In, Get Started)
Sign In button correctly navigates to /login
Get Started button correctly navigates to /login
Pricing page loads with 4 clear pricing tiers (Free Trial, $200 per letter, $499 monthly, $699 monthly)
FAQ page loads with comprehensive sections and professional content
Login form renders with email, password, Google OAuth, and forgot password links
Professional visual design with legal imagery and appropriate color scheme
Terms of Service and Privacy Policy links in login form
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix backend tRPC server - all API endpoints returning 502 errors. Check if backend server is running on port 8001 and properly configured. Frontend UI is excellent and ready for production.

success_percentage.backend: 0% - All API endpoints failing with 502 errors
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components, navigation, and pages working perfectly
success_percentage.overall_user_experience: 25% - Users can view content but cannot perform any actions requiring backend

homepage.title: Talk to My Lawyer — Professional Legal Letters
key_features: Clear value proposition about attorney-reviewed letters
Multiple letter types showcased (Breach of Contract, Demand for Payment, etc.)

pricing_tiers: Free Trial - First letter with attorney review

sections: Service questions and attorney review process

backend_api_analysis.diagnosis: Frontend static files are being served correctly, but the backend API server (likely Express + tRPC) is not responding. This suggests a server process or port configuration issue.
